/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/benchmark/benchmark_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/benchmark/uti.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/benchmark/backends/wah/wah_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/benchmark/backends/croaring/croaring_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/benchmark/backends/combit/combit_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/benchmark/backends/ewah/ewah_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/benchmark/backends/Concise/concise_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/benchmark/backends/bitset/bitset_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/benchmark/backends/bitset_avx512/bitset_avx512_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/core/croaring/roaring.c.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/core/fastbit/bitvector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/core/fastbit/bitvector16.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/core/fastbit/bitvector8.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/core/fastbit/fileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/core/fastbit/resource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/core/fastbit/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/core/fastbit/array_t.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_app.dir/src/core/utils/util.cpp.o -o benchmark_app  src/core/combit/libcombit.a src/core/bitset/libbitset_core.a -latomic /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0
